ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College where the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's current salary */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's agent (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assistant coach */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_assistant_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rushing_stats" (
  "rush_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rushing stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the rushing stats */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the rushing occurred */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "average" REAL /* Average yards per attempt */,
  "long_run" INTEGER /* Longest rush during the game */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored in rushing */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles during the game */,
  "first_downs" INTEGER /* Number of first downs gained by rushing */,
  "longest_run_with_touchdown" INTEGER /* The longest run that resulted in a touchdown */,
  "two_point_conversions" INTEGER /* Number of successful two-point conversions by rushing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rush_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player for which the stats are recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "total_rushing_attempts" INTEGER /* Total rushing attempts in the season */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards in the season */,
  "total_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total rushing touchdowns in the season */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Total number of receptions in the season */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards in the season */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total receiving touchdowns in the season */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Total number of sacks made in the season */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total number of interceptions made in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the injury was reported */,
  "expected_return" TEXT /* Expected date of return to play */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "rehab_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player started rehabilitation */,
  "rehab_end_date" TEXT /* Expected date when the player will complete rehabilitation */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Actual date when the player returned to play (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is affiliated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's current contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the coach's current contract */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player linked to this health record */,
  "weight" REAL /* Current weight of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Current height of the player */,
  "last_checkup" TEXT /* Date of the last health checkup */,
  "fitness_score" INTEGER /* Fitness score based on various parameters */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Player's heart rate during the last checkup */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Player's blood pressure during the last checkup */,
  "body_fat_percentage" REAL /* Player's body fat percentage */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Summary of the player's injury history */,
  "training_intensity" TEXT /* Current training intensity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_health_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stats record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which stats are recorded */,
  "total_yards_home" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the home team */,
  "total_yards_away" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the away team */,
  "total_turnovers_home" INTEGER /* Total turnovers made by the home team */,
  "total_turnovers_away" INTEGER /* Total turnovers made by the away team */,
  "total_passes_home" INTEGER /* Total number of passes by the home team */,
  "total_passes_away" INTEGER /* Total number of passes by the away team */,
  "total_rush_attempts_home" INTEGER /* Total number of rush attempts by the home team */,
  "total_rush_attempts_away" INTEGER /* Total number of rush attempts by the away team */,
  "total_penalties_home" INTEGER /* Total number of penalties by the home team */,
  "total_penalties_away" INTEGER /* Total number of penalties by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offensive_plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the play occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who executed the play */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., rush, pass) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., gain, loss, touchdown) */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the play in seconds */,
  "play_distance" INTEGER /* Distance covered by the play */,
  "play_result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the play result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offensive_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offensive_plays_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defensive_stats" (
  "defensive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defensive stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the defensive stats */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "forced_fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of forced fumbles */,
  "fumble_recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of fumble recoveries */,
  "pass_deflections" INTEGER /* Number of pass deflections */,
  "safety" INTEGER /* Number of safeties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defensive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defensive_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year_awarded" INTEGER /* Year when the award was received */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the award */,
  "award_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the award ceremony */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
